name: Rice Beans
recipeIngredient: 2 15-oz cans of any type of beans
recipeInstructions:
1. If using uncooked rice, start cooking it.
2. Rinse canned beans thoroughly in a colander.
3. In a large nonstick frying pan, add salsa, minced garlic, and chopped onions. Saute until onions are limp.
4. Add cumin to the pan and continue sauteing for a minute.
5. Add tomato sauce and tabasco sauce, and simmer for 10 minutes.
6. If using cooked rice, reheat it now.
7. Five minutes before the rice is ready, stir in the beans gently and simmer until well heated.
8. Serve beans over rice.
From "Think Light" meal program, which states:
Serves 4 (1-cup) servings. Per serving - 424 calories. 2.7 gms fat (5% cff). 84 gms carb. 21 gms protein. 450 mg sodium. 25 gms fiber.
